description:
An open-source remake of the short-lived jetbrains git client


Commits
- 8e27d5c: fix displayed version and publisher on the windows installer (detachhead) #158
- e911677: fix copyright year range in about window (detachhead) #158
- 344ad04: macos intel support (#168) (DetachHead) #158
Note
the intel macOS build is not yet available on the homebrew tap. for now, you can install it manually
